name: Mexican Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded white turkey meat, cooked and skinned
1 cup nonfat mozzarella or jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the tortillas in the chicken broth until golden.
Remove and set aside.
2. Add onion to the skillet and cook until tender.
3. Drain the tomatoes and reserve the liquid. Pour the reserved liquid into
the skillet; cover and heat on high for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the tomatoes, turkey, and pepper; heat through.
5. Reduce heat to low. Add the tortillas and egg substitute back into the
skillet; cover and cook for 4-6 minutes or until the eggs are set.
6. Sprinkle with cheese; cover and heat one more minute or until the cheese
is melted. Serve immediately.
